Ambesonne Burnt Orange Geometric Throw Pillow Case

8.64 USD

Availability: In stock

A pack of 4 throw pillow cases with a warm, geometric burnt orange design. Double-sided print on premium microfiber fabric, machine washable, and dryer safe for easy care. Perfect for adding style to your chair, sofa, or car.
Quantiy:
- +
  • Description
  • Additional information
  • Reviews
  A stunning throw pillow case with a burnt orange geometric pattern, perfect for adding warmth and modern flair to your space. The double-sided print lets you choose your favorite design, and the premium microfiber fabric ensures durability and softness.
  Experience the beauty of timeless design with Ambesonne's throw pillow case. Featuring a unique grunge effect and geometric patterns, this pillow case is perfect for creating a cozy, comfortable atmosphere in your home. Machine washable for easy care, and the insert is included for added convenience.
